name: Geometric Printed Tile Persian Rug - Threshold™
description:
Create a lovely focal point without overwhelming your existing decor with this Geometric Printed Tile Persian Rug from Threshold™. Showcasing a distressed geometric Persian tiles print with side tassels in multicolored hues for a lived-in yet stylish look, and a woven design for plush comfort underfoot, this geo printed rug makes a wonderful addition to any room. With a durable latex backing that helps keep the rug in place and a low pile height that's easy to clean and maintain, this rectangular area rug brings style and comfort to any space.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
